name: Ben Carson
subject: Will you be there when I take the stage?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29302582:28108552521:m:1:876315805:C7D4AA22478002620DFE45B9DDD2D7ED:r)
---
|

Peter, On August 6 in Cleveland, Ohio I plan to take the stage with nine of my fellow candidates for the first debate of the 2016 presidential primary.

**I want to give you and a guest the opportunity to be there in person. All you have to do is enter our sweepstakes before time runs out on Tuesday night.**

**[To be automatically entered, I urge you to donate $5 or more right now. ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29302582:28108552521:m:1:876315805:C7D4AA22478002620DFE45B9DDD2D7ED:r)
** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29302582:28108552521:m:1:876315805:C7D4AA22478002620DFE45B9DDD2D7ED:r)
---
As a young boy growing up, I spent many of my days in the Detroit Public Library reading anything I could get my hands on. Between the covers of those books, I could be anyone and I could go anywhere.

But never did I think that I would be on a debate stage before a national audience as a candidate for President of the United States.

August 6 will be an historic moment for me, and I am thrilled for the opportunity to share my vision for reviving America with my fellow citizens.

As I look out upon the audience, it would be a great feeling to see you there supporting me in person.

**[Again, I ask you to donate $5 or more to be automatically entered into our sweepstakes, and my campaign will be taking care of everything else.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29302582:28108552521:m:1:876315805:C7D4AA22478002620DFE45B9DDD2D7ED:r)**

Thank you for your ongoing support.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS SWEEPSTAKES** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this sweepstakes. You may enter sweepstakes without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29302583:28108552521:m:1:876315805:C7D4AA22478002620DFE45B9DDD2D7ED:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "FIRST GOP DEBATE" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29302584:28108552521:m:1:876315805:C7D4AA22478002620DFE45B9DDD2D7ED:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to Cleveland, transportation, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This sweepstakes is sponsored by Carson America, Inc. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: The best way to stand up to Barack Obama?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Do you think the best way to stand up and fight President Barack Obama is to run away with your tail tucked between your legs?

I'm afraid some of my colleagues in Congress do when it comes to defunding Planned Parenthood.

But I'm not backing down. With your help, the U.S. Senate will vote on my bill to stop taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood whether they like it or not!

But time is running out.

That's why I'm counting on you to call you U.S. senators at once.

The truth is, this is a fight you and I can't ignore.

I'm convinced the American people want action.

Like most Americans, I was disgusted to see the undercover video footage where Planned Parenthood's chief abortionist explains how they harvest aborted babies' organs and sell them for profit.

Since the video's release, the fallout has been incredible.

Hillary Clinton hasn't said a word.

And the abortion lobby is scared stiff.

In fact, shortly after the release of the video, Planned Parenthood's damage control department apologized for their chief abortionist's "tone" for discussing how she carefully killed and dismembered unborn babies to sell their organs for profit.

They should have "apologized" for her honesty.

Gone were the flowery euphemisms they use to conceal their true actions.

Instead, this video showed the sick, soulless truth behind those who make their living off aborting unborn babies. Now we learn they're selling off their parts as well!

Yet the outrage that you and I feel isn't shared by those in Congress who would rather keep up business as usual than heed the will of the American people.

They're too busy trying to figure out how to spend more of your money in corporate welfare through the Export-Import bank.

I guess they think stripping Planned Parenthood of half a billion of our tax dollars can be put off until later. Or maybe never.

After all, they think you and I will just forget all about this in a few days.

First, they need to take care of the business of paying off their cronies.

Fellow Conservative, I'm not going to stand for this!

What Planned Parenthood is doing is wrong. It's sickening that this is happening in this country you and I treasure so much.

And it's time for every member of Congress who used pro-Life rhetoric to get votes on the campaign trail to keep their promises.

Not next week. Not next month. But NOW.

If you and I can convince enough senators to stand with me, the U.S. Senate will have no choice but to vote on my bill to strip every last dime of taxpayer funding from Planned Parenthood.

Congress has the power of the purse. So this is a fight you and I can win even with President Obama in the White House.

Studies show stopping funding for Planned Parenthood will result in more saved lives.

Please help me. **[Please sign your petition](https://randpaul.com/f/defund-cosponsor-2?sr=rhf072515nd)** and call your U.S. senators at **202-224-3121** at once.

Tell them to "stand with Rand" and sign my petition to force a vote on defunding Planned Parenthood.

**[And if you can, please agree to you most generous gift of $20.16 or more at once](https://randpaul.com/f/defund-cosponsor-2?sr=rhf072515nd)**!

Your generosity will help me mobilize more Americans to this critical fight.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](https://randpaul.com/f/defund-cosponsor-2?sr=rhf072515nd)

name: Doug Stafford
subject: There's going to be a brouhaha over this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
"There ought to be a vote. It ought to be now. Shouldn't be in six months. Shouldn't be in a year."
\- Rand Paul, 7/24/2015, _CBS Philly_ Fellow Conservative,

In an interview yesterday with _CBS Philly's_ Dom Giordano, Rand Paul drew a firm line in the sand when he announced that he'd filed a petition to force a vote on his amendment to defund Planned Parenthood.

"Right now it looks like they're not going to let me have a vote, but there's going to be a brouhaha over this. We're coming back in on Sunday."

Fellow Conservative, this fight is heating up, and Rand needs as much grassroots muscle as he can get on this one.

Under Senate rules, if enough senators are willing to Stand with Rand and sign his petition demanding a vote -- there will be no stopping Rand.

So it's critical you call your U.S. senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand." Then please **[add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to Rand's petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29308281:28115475165:m:1:879035888:48BF544564BF412D0B606DC9619438D3:r)** demanding a vote on defunding Planned Parenthood.

I've included a **[brief audio clip of Rand's interview yesterday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29308281:28115475165:m:1:879035888:48BF544564BF412D0B606DC9619438D3:r)** on _CBS Philly_ with Dom Giordano. As you'll hear from Rand's tone, the sanctity of life is something that he takes very seriously.

And he's not going to let Congress put off stripping Planned Parenthood of half a billion of hard-working Americans' tax dollars each year.

But Fellow Conservative, Rand needs your help to gather the signatures needed.

Please call your U.S. senators at **(202) 224-3121** and tell them to "Stand with Rand" and sign his petition to defund Planned Parenthood.

After you've called your senators, please **[add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to Rand's petition and chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29308281:28115475165:m:1:879035888:48BF544564BF412D0B606DC9619438D3:r)** to help generate even more pressure.

But please act right away, Fellow Conservative. Senator Paul is counting on you.

In Liberty,

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

body:
Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
This week, we got a great illustration of why this campaign to break the Washington Cartel, reignite the promise of America, and restore power to the American people is so important. Fireworks broke out on the Senate floor yesterday as Ted set out to shine a light on the backroom deals taking place in our nation's capital.
Some time ago, Ted asked the Senate Majority Leader if a deal had been cut to reauthorize the Export-Import Bank -- a classic example of cronyism and corporate welfare that puts the taxpayers on the hook for hundreds of millions of dollars of loan guarantees that go primarily to a handful of giant corporations \-- and, _three times_ , he said there was no deal.
Yesterday it became apparent the Majority Leader had not told the truth. He brought up the reauthorization of the Export-Import Bank. Why? Because that's what the Washington Cartel wanted. Government of the lobbyists, by the lobbyists, and for the lobbyists was on display for all of America to see.
And then the long knives came out against Ted because he dared to tell the truth and expose what was really happening. Ted, in a very rare interview, spoke with Rush Limbaugh to explain exactly what happened. [**You 'll want to listen to what he said**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvAPjykqO4FkMTXQRGwBkz6nkilfgB-2BMGK5L36LBBSBZQA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEHeFGO0obL3NvEO7Y68pwMukz5h-2F6j0Yu2JIodd9k20g-2FZRVq7gyv4DwRh1A8dUoRWXkC7hcKPGzhQ-2BXF2w7e73OICQxEKlr-2B-2BGKeRhx2Yg25lAl3MflB9Yi5f4awUoBRl632CIfJ3vbNMFaGP5AnET-2BcsHYaD7FudPRXaydmrtMKJiCXh25gb-2FLSWUAWbMjmhvF4ZtHYwIvyZ0O1KmdgGTl-2FJfN1OUfWmvQ20FnkMsD4m-2FiyX-2FzibY6LT8eQ7-2FMubmXYjWweMmsiEukfJZHmrOGpl7NktgGeqURAGrNtJG17DmquKvZJE7lkh20H0TPQYqDPeVQxWWa-2Fbw8n71l7HHDbTSIuE0OjZQzdB8i1Zeh0x19EoDM8Jhu7oDI6AFoU-3D).
The American people are rightfully frustrated because Republicans keep winning elections, and then our leaders don't do what they said they were going to do. Far too many "campaign conservatives" pretend to be conservatives on the campaign trail, but they don't govern based upon what they promised us on the stump. And that's precisely why, this week, Ted was endorsed by both [movement conservative leader Brent Bozell](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvAfaEB-2BJhuQUae012qn4RW1WWP4Mihn17sXKzgjfQTrhQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEHeFGO0obL3NvEO7Y68pwMuKNuVF5vDjsVEU-2Feryqx40U8uXis0-2F-2BfRL0K4bBvjZSZGJ744P4wyosB8vOlnkDHZ2A9M-2FARJrDDhPNnHyi-2Fs8vAKc-2BkWhlAvBztxAY5JSH3SZlrLk-2BQRYuTBLUB42uMBFUxchqE0C3V78AydxcPojGkMXbXKeiqlLaSxVlc-2BdQQNTFEeAN-2FOAHHAjRBJfKqMLuLUBv78GfQPDjzjahbdNQCFYcobYo7CKMjonIygdfnA59j-2FxEso9TT2Hj-2FKcOGKDy866QOqyWhRb2ZBQ5XVewqjLcOd-2FhuciO2YI6Cu48TmRKJshvU5eMfBlJ1EN-2FQstMZXeBiyCdfXd1-2F4-2BofVhWKsbgEVOIApCPKIbpiERs-3D) and [Oklahoma Congressman Jim Bridenstine](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjyVuVQ2uaYGynMVQaGKWXwYDvQGVjWAdFDrt3mpzVaFSqNXpg2AcKnoy6mJ1aUXw0V09A2PooqLCqwsslj8Mep0_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEHeFGO0obL3NvEO7Y68pwMoDNrW8IB0a-2FXIoBtL3tet6vr9N7YhJiZWjdSXDN5RMnXlYwmKRw946PbCNm1-2FP-2BFPEXfIPDMp2Ohm02qkRrvlivTdAS-2BaixuLjv32y1iZg39bDv90aTMXmkowzV8RJE39uowoYugIk2QEO6KCy9bdZn7QzQ-2BM1Fb084D2U-2B9Z3ukakyq5oyaH-2BIRFzVK5M7QjGkGszV8hYA7FS-2FLvOyTvx6EaoyHLK1LGbX-2B-2BqJyQFKd5-2FZ1U7RvZwY4NnLq3IT39eutYz7kNMgJvajPgDj9WhQpjyzVVnBYLMKZaar1ekIRDUE5pgOd-2FTRJ7veCKh86D1ko2-2BJrnttnLp-2BZ3mzRdv3yYdUbppccivep-2B23I3I0-3D).
[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvAfaEB-2BJhuQUae012qn4RW1WWP4Mihn17sXKzgjfQTrhQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEHeFGO0obL3NvEO7Y68pwMFYI996LWYsynPXA-2FX1KPSAfS-2BMxdFTOcufoKYMCFIVDYv3fBGIhUZWdxKQ-2B-2BWmheHG9uhfOeTfyJ-2F71gnDgkMx22omUsi9dm1pJ-2FzKyyrRgLfcRNHFbtIjmYIPqKL5QTlNdjMJn2qch5Oe0EiFsJ-2FeiJq49GEFAfuM7Anh4L11sJJHOLCEJoW70vJWRmICWUrQ1i1zEvvIUWM8HNO-2FRlcucdrb0QugTW1kfUdD-2FQ-2Fcdtry8hTah5WzUt-2BZYHoTqFzTa2d5TcsnMLld4CoJdp90jAl-2F0IMY7Wo9V6u31aW5-2FMH6E9Df-2FWgOBAZAWNR7-2BDEB6H-2BH0RRTInRsLpjHcK9xPlNGd4aPtJTASCdJJWunI-3D)
That same frustration with career politicians in both parties is why we've seen such an outpouring of support for this campaign from courageous conservatives like yourself. Hundreds of thousands of you have signed up to volunteer, shown up to rallies across the nation, shown your support online, and contributed financially. **THANK YOU**! And that tremendous showing of support is translating into terrific polling numbers. A [new poll](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjwttIaYUCVQe8inrXpRQBlyFBydZ-2Brn5S0t29oTazBgZOqMXMz3UgsD4cQRT0bK6BY-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEHeFGO0obL3NvEO7Y68pwMbv2DuionGAHP4M-2BaPFcU6Gf1nUkmm1arB-2BXCzSlusLhrcFRF4WavPtrFSEoUPRP1LPU0oBQST46-2FgoCYtDJa6sUY2MdFwUOwewo0xikab-2Bn0ainVRtfpTLnfYMEwqivAwKtZEqoGLoM5Boy84ndOBLgoeBWng2tKAliYvISQskxTwcL-2BFrYzyCktUmh5VPFvuS9eXp1Zljk1FNIghmGiLgn-2BHkMkrSiFBc-2BpSl-2BgTtKlsD1oQ0xoFV-2FI2DAXNOknXyg-2BEuX0h-2Fay-2FnIdFAc09AULUfXWYldZDCkVibVB-2BT-2FrA-2BFA3zm70mZ4Hf1K2H9W7YlUXCcZ05AcgdDksAz2AMDx4enEhNp-2FRksPc7ciXLE-3D) this week shows that Ted is firmly in the top tier of candidates. [**Read more about it here**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjwttIaYUCVQe8inrXpRQBlyFBydZ-2Brn5S0t29oTazBgZOqMXMz3UgsD4cQRT0bK6BY-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEHeFGO0obL3NvEO7Y68pwMUlY4DPgrO18NodV-2F7bd5xo3VUwIcunH1PfwTeOHwPF90-2FmXr0JKn2-2F2-2FF5-2Fa2nvRSITrixjwITxTuymMQF8h88kSxyzLz7cVqF1Hq2cWteFEL0QSewX3FPG8kaByJEieA9IOHy6r4yCIGGc7GDARTgpjvVf1SY8lkdXlF8Tgm9oVwSG-2FAepo-2FN762uGuKJLZRAVOmCjg3B2FGQqj5LDZezEeeLlBalunsMTbnGiTznQpjWnVxP1S1tPwDdBBzVM7ZhX-2Fv6hUficCRvCN6bbOKDyJtbZuN-2F5c6Xrt-2FwR35ILzvK2MHc2xbgqwHpBBhmOJuKj98GTbD4Egx39nmSC5MwnIWUdzRrQwjjTQbRM4kgI-3D).
And speaking of rallies, I also wanted to remind you about the August 21st Rally for Religious Liberty in Des Moines that Ted will be hosting with Dick and Betty Odgaard -- the Iowa couple who is shutting down their business as a result of the Iowa Civil Rights Commission's efforts to force them to host a same-sex wedding ceremony in violation of their religious beliefs. clean_body: Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America Hello Friend, This week, we got a great illustration of why this campaign to break the Washington Cartel, reignite the promise of America, and restore power to the American people is so important. Fireworks broke out on the Senate floor yesterday as Ted set out to shine a light on the backroom deals taking place in our nation's capital. Some time ago, Ted asked the Senate Majority Leader if a deal had been cut to reauthorize the Export-Import Bank -- a classic example of cronyism and corporate welfare that puts the taxpayers on the hook for hundreds of millions of dollars of loan guarantees that go primarily to a handful of giant corporations \-- and, three times , he said there was no deal. Yesterday it became apparent the Majority Leader had not told the truth. He brought up the reauthorization of the Export-Import Bank. Why? Because that's what the Washington Cartel wanted. Government of the lobbyists, by the lobbyists, and for the lobbyists was on display for all of America to see. And then the long knives came out against Ted because he dared to tell the truth and expose what was really happening. Ted, in a very rare interview, spoke with Rush Limbaugh to explain exactly what happened. . The American people are rightfully frustrated because Republicans keep winning elections, and then our leaders don't do what they said they were going to do. Far too many "campaign conservatives" pretend to be conservatives on the campaign trail, but they don't govern based upon what they promised us on the stump. And that's precisely why, this week, Ted was endorsed by both and . That same frustration with career politicians in both parties is why we've seen such an outpouring of support for this campaign from courageous conservatives like yourself. Hundreds of thousands of you have signed up to volunteer, shown up to rallies across the nation, shown your support online, and contributed financially. THANK YOU! And that tremendous showing of support is translating into terrific polling numbers. A this week shows that Ted is firmly in the top tier of candidates. . And speaking of rallies, I also wanted to remind you about the August 21st Rally for Religious Liberty in Des Moines that Ted will be hosting with Dick and Betty Odgaard -- the Iowa couple who is shutting down their business as a result of the Iowa Civil Rights Commission's efforts to force them to host a same-sex wedding ceremony in violation of their religious beliefs. We announced the rally in a on Tuesday. . Also this week, our campaign calling attention to the gruesome videos that appear to show Planned Parenthood attempting to profit off of the body parts of aborted babies. Ted is leading the charge to fully defund Planned Parenthood, and your support in that endeavor would be greatly appreciated. and . As always, we thank you for being a part of Team Cruz. You truly are an integral part of this campaign, and if there's anything we can do, please don't hesitate to let us know.
